programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - The Big Bake-Off
programme.desc: Our Top 24 are woken in the night by George to be told they will be baking bread at Sonoma bakery.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 1
programme.desc: The bottom three from yesterday’s Rabbit mystery box face off in the first pressure test at MCK.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Team Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants cook for up to 700 punters at one of Sydney’s busiest and largest pubs on a hot summer’s day.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 2
programme.desc: Chelsea, Rachel and Ellie recreate an Australianised pork with fried rice, without the aid of a recipe.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 3
programme.desc: Peter, Sun and Craig have to take on chef Adam D'Sylva from Melbourne restaurant Coda.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Team Challenge 2
programme.desc: The teams are tasked with catering for a busy Sunday morning at Cronulla Beach for 500 hungry nippers.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 4
programme.desc: Antonio Carluccio creates Handkerchief pasta with Ligurian Pesto.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Invention Test 2
programme.desc: The winners of the Team Challenge compete against each other at Margaret River's Clairault Winery.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 4
programme.desc: Cooking at the end of a very long jetty, Jay competes with professional chef Tony Howell.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 2
programme.desc: Andrew and Kumar face a "Fix that Dish" Challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 5
programme.desc: In tonight's MasterClass, Brendan Pratt cooks slow roasted lamb shoulder with croquettes.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 5
programme.desc: In an immunity challenge, Danielle faces off against Nordic chef Thorsten Schmidt

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Team Challenge 4
programme.desc: Teams are asked to prepare six dishes with only one team member cooking at any one time.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 3
programme.desc: Shannon and Arena put themselves forward as the two weakest performers from the Red Team.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Qantas Fine Dining Challenge
programme.desc: Contestants pair up and are asked to prepare one of eight courses of Neil Perry's QANTAS First Class menu.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 6
programme.desc: Kate competes against Darren Purchese, Melbourne's answer to Adriano Zumbo.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Team Challenge 5
programme.desc: In the sustainable food challenge, contestants prepare a lunch service at the Greenhouse "pop up" restaurant.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 5
programme.desc: The losing team face a three-round elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 7
programme.desc: The judges reveal the secret to cooking the perfect spotted dick.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Westfield Team Challenge
programme.desc: Teams are asked to prepare simple dishes that have specific dietary requirements.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 8
programme.desc: The fierce battle for the immunity pin sees Christine Manfield as a guest judge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Blind Taste Test
programme.desc: The Blue Team are faced with two challenges: a Taste Test and an Invention Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 9
programme.desc: As a reward, contestants Ellie and Alana are given another culinary lesson by the best chefs in New Zealand.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Mystery Box Challenge 4
programme.desc: In a Sunday Challenge, the contestants are faced with a Mystery Box and an Invention Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 9
programme.desc: Chef Alessandro Pavoni challenges Dani to make a tray of sibas, squid soup, and tomato powder for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Marco Pierre White Challenge
programme.desc: Billy returns to the house after Mat's removal.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 10
programme.desc: Luke Nguyen conducts a special master class about Vietnamese cuisine.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.desc: Four sets of twins compete for $50,000 as they are electric shocked.

programme.desc: Four teams of two attempt to win $50,000.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 10
programme.desc: Hayden, Kate and Michael have 90 minutes to cook a dish demonstrating skills acquired during the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Mystery Box Challenge 5
programme.desc: In a Mystery Box Challenge, the top 5 pick each other's ingredients as per the Secret Santa method.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Cooking for Loved Ones Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants cook ten servings of a single dish of their choosing for the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 13
programme.desc: The chefs learn the art of setting up and plating dishes at their master class.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Grand Finale
programme.desc: Kate and Michael facee off in the Grand Finale, which consists of three challenges.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Auditions
programme.desc: MasterChef New Zealand returns for its fourth season.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - EP2
programme.desc: The Top 24 contestants face two sudden death challenges to find who will go through to the Top 16.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Master Hangi
programme.desc: The Top 16 contestants move into the MasterChef mansion, then face a team hangi challenge on Mokoia Island.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Mexican
programme.desc: The Top 15 contestants must cook authentic Mexican dishes for guest chef Jose Carlos de la Macorra.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Biggest Mystery Box
programme.desc: The Top 14 contestants face the biggest mystery box challenge ever.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - The Last Supper
programme.desc: The Top 13 contestants cook the meal they would choose for their Last Supper.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The Top 12 contestants cook for 1800 passengers aboard cruise ship Dawn Princess.

programme.title: Immunity Challenge: Dan Hong
programme.desc: Ben battles against celebrity chef Dan Hong in the first immunity pin challenge of the season.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Auditions
programme.desc: Hundreds of hopeful contestants compete for a place in the Top 50.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 50: Mornington Peninsula Challenge
programme.desc: The top 12 performers from the Mystery Box challenge travel to the Mornington Peninsula.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 50: Salmon Challenge
programme.desc: The remaining contestants are given the choice to compete for one of five spots in the Top 24.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 50: Pressure Test
programme.desc: In their first Pressure Test, Shannon Bennett brings a twist on the classic Peach Melba.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 1
programme.desc: The top 18 contestants travel to Daylesford Lake House for their first MasterClass with Alla Wolf-Tasker.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 50: Elimination Challenge - French Cuisine
programme.desc: The remaining twelve hopefuls faced a French Invention Test set by Jacques Reymond at Montsalvat.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 24: Mystery Box
programme.desc: The Top 24 contestants enter the MasterChef Australia kitchen for their first mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: King's Cross
programme.desc: In their first Team Challenge, contestants took over the running of two of King's Cross best restaurants.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Pasta
programme.desc: In a three-round pasta-themed challenge, the Red Team fight for their places in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 2
programme.desc: Gary and George demonstrate some seafood recipes for the contestants.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - EP13
programme.desc: In the Mystery Box challenge, contestants are faced with a range of ingredients that have to be "cracked".

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Peter Gilmore
programme.desc: Star chef Peter Gilmore sets the bottom three contestants a Pressure Test.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Scorpion Tales
programme.desc: Four teams of family members compete for $50,000 as they careen into a quarry full of live ammunition.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - The Bees Are So Angry
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars on a five stunt, 2 hour spectacular.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Leeches & Shaved Heads & Tear Gas
programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Snake Bite
programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Roach Coach
programme.desc: Four teams of two compete for $50,000 as they are locked in a cage and sunk underwater.
